details.address: 222 West Blvd Ste S112, Charlotte, NC 28203

raw_data.address: 222 West Blvd Ste S112, Charlotte, NC 28203
raw_data.name: Glowgirl Café

reviews_data.review_text:
The atmosphere is peaceful, esthetically pleasing and welcoming.
The staff that we encountered greeted us with big smiles and a warm heart felt welcome and good conversation.
We visited to share some of our sweets and we were offered beverages. The coffee & matcha were amazing (a must try!)

And to now know it is a place that also did permanent jewelry was a pleasant surprise.

For all of the girly girls out there, the coffee enthusiasts, the jewelry lovers, the social butterflies; this is the place to be 🩷

10/10 will be back again

Glow Girl Café is a charming and unique concept - a small café nestled inside Glow Girl, a permanent jewelry boutique in Charlotte. The space is aesthetically pleasing and makes for a lovely visit, particularly if you appreciate the combination of specialty drinks and handcrafted jewelry. I visited specifically for the matcha, which was genuinely enjoyable in terms of flavor and quality. Worth noting is that the portion size is on the smaller side relative to the price point, so guests should set expectations accordingly - this feels more like a treat-yourself experience than an everyday café stop. The staff member I interacted with, Claire, was warm, welcoming, and attentive. A lovely spot for a special outing or a unique Charlotte experience.
I love how the people were kind and helpful and I loved the matcha

I had a fantastic experience here, the atmosphere is incredibly bright and uplifting, and their selection of fresh, nourishing options makes it the perfect  spot  for a healthy and delicious energy boost!

My niece and I came to visit this dreamy company because my niece wanted a bracelet and being the great auntie I am, we both received one! We fell in love with the pink decor (my favorite color 🩷) and the amazing selection of jewelry to choose from, which is the largest I’ve ever seen! We are both coffee lovers and we tried Lover Girl Strawberry Dream and AMAZING!!!!! Not only was it great, the price is reasonable, actually cheaper than Starbucks! Overall, the owner was beautiful and patient with us, giving us a great experience!

20/10 Definitely worth the visit!
It was my first time but I couldn’t help but smile! I love my bracelet and the lover girl  latte was to die for!
i loved the matcha and my bracelet so muchhh

The CUTEST girl cafe!!!! 🎀 Shoutout to CLAIRE!!! The café had closed when we walked in. She let her Coworker leave and went above and beyond and  still made us the most amazing Matcha lattes!!! Love the environment, the service, and the friendly customer service!! Will be returning!! 💕💕💕
I love glow girl! The cafe is so cute & the coffee taste just as good as it looks. I got a permanent anklet which I love. Can’t wait to come back.
Amazing
Adorable vibes. Friendly staff. DELICIOUS COFFEEEEE…..

I had such an amazing experience at GLOWGIRL! From the moment I walked in, the vibe was super welcoming and aesthetic, it instantly made me feel comfortable. The staff is so sweet, professional, and really takes their time to make sure everything is perfect. The quality of their jewelry is beautiful, and I love how customizable everything is. You can tell they really care about their work and making sure you leave happy. My piece turned out even better than I expected and I’ve gotten so many compliments on it already! Not to mention, their cafe is super cute and their drinks are top tier! From coffee to matcha lovers they have it all! If you’re in Charlotte and looking for a fun, high-quality experience (especially for permanent jewelry), I definitely recommend GLOWGIRL!
This location is beautiful. The coffee choices were amazing & delicious. The owner was very friendly. Will definitely be going back! It’s was a great experience!
Besttt Matcha ever!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Nancy, thank you so much for stopping by Glowgirl Café, we truly appreciate your visit.

It looks like your review may be referencing our jewelry selection, while this page is dedicated to the Glowgirl Café experience.

That said, our pink dreamy jewelry studio is proud to offer over 30 unique chain designs, and we’ve been told we carry one of the largest selections in the city. We would love to welcome you back to explore our one of a kind Glowgirl engraved and permanent jewelry experience.
reviews_data.review_text: This is a permant jewelry store with a coffee bar inside.  Not impressed with the chain selection, we left before it was our turn.
We had so much fun here!! The vibe is so cute and welcoming! Coffee was very good, process was easy & fast. They have tons of chains to choose from and a variety of jewelry.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Cailyn. Thank you so much for your review! We’re thrilled that you loved the cute pink girly ambiance of Glowgirl Café and enjoyed your drink. Creating a fun, unique experience is exactly what we strive for, so we’re happy to hear that part of your visit stood out.

We did want to clarify that our beverages are served in 16 oz cups and are priced at $7.50. As Charlotte’s first jewelry café experience, Glowgirl Café is designed to be more than a traditional coffee shop. We’ve created a destination where guests can enjoy specialty drinks, shop jewelry, gather with friends, and experience a space thoughtfully designed to feel beautiful, welcoming, and uniquely Glowgirl.

For your next visit, we’d be happy to make your drink with light ice if you’d prefer even more beverage in your cup. We always want our guests to leave feeling satisfied and cared for.

Thank you again for stopping by and supporting our small business. We hope to welcome you back soon for another delicious beverage.
reviews_data.review_text: While the place is so cute and the drinks we had were delicious, the coffee was ridiculously expensive for what appeared to be a 12oz cup which was half ice. All of the drinks cost $7.50 and came is cute cups, but were a lot smaller than we were expecting. There is also only one barista so once we ordered our coffee, we had to wait 15 minutes for our coffee to be made which was unexpected.
